# DB UX Design System v3 Core Web

All development instructions, build commands, validation steps, coding rules, and the pull request workflow are maintained in **`AGENTS.md`** at the repository root. Read that file first before starting any task.

For UI development tasks, also read **`.amazonq/rules/db-ux-mcp-workflow.md`** — it contains the mandatory MCP workflow for using DB UX Design System components.
